column3: ['Log in to the system as CAA program manager. ', 'Navigate to the trial build-up creation page. ', 'Enter required details for a new phased trial build-up, including gates and evidence requirements. ', 'Save the newly created phased trial build-up. ', 'Verify that the new phased trial build-up has been saved. ', 'Attempt to make a reversible change at each gate. ']
column4: ['Successfully log in with valid credentials. ', 'Access the trial build-up creation page. ', 'All entered information is saved correctly in the system. ', 'The system saves the new phased trial build-up with all defined gates and evidence requirements. ', 'The new phased trial build-up appears in the list of available trials. ', 'Each gate allows for reversible changes. ']
